name: aggregator marks plugin rule superseded_by_operator when operator extension overrides same id
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json | node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on("data",d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{const r=JSON.parse(s);const matches=r.rules.filter(x=>x.id==="g-ts-001");if(matches.length!==2){process.stderr.write("FAIL: expected 2 entries for g-ts-001, got "+matches.length+"
");process.exit(1)}const plugin=matches.find(x=>x.origin==="plugin");const operator=matches.find(x=>x.origin==="operator");if(!plugin||!operator){process.stderr.write("FAIL: missing plugin or operator entry
");process.exit(1)}if(plugin.superseded_by_operator!==true){process.stderr.write("FAIL: plugin not marked superseded_by_operator
");process.exit(1)}if(!operator.supersedes||operator.supersedes.source_file!==plugin.source_file){process.stderr.write("FAIL: operator missing supersedes pointer
");process.exit(1)}if(operator.superseded_by_operator===true){process.stderr.write("FAIL: operator should not be marked superseded
");process.exit(1)}process.stderr.write("ok
")});'
setup:
cat > tree/google/tsguide.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: google-tsguide
  authoritative_publisher: Google LLC
  authoritative_url: https://google.github.io/styleguide/tsguide.html
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:plugin
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    name: no-any
    description: "Plugin default for no-any."
    detector: rubric/detectors/no-any.sh
    severity: P1
recommended_set: [g-ts-001]
all_set: [g-ts-001]
EOF

cat > tree/_operator/google/tsguide-extensions.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: google-tsguide
  authoritative_publisher: Google LLC (operator override)
  authoritative_url: https://google.github.io/styleguide/tsguide.html
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:operator
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    name: no-any
    description: "Operator override: stricter no-any with zero tolerance."
    detector: rubric/detectors/no-any.sh
    severity: P0
recommended_set: [g-ts-001]
all_set: [g-ts-001]
EOF
